description: Page metadata + componentTypes round-trip fixture: a page with name/aspectTypeId/description/pageTitle/pageDescription/pageKeywords populated for the default locale, plus a fr_FR pageContent overlay that replaces every metadata field. The page carries one hero component referencing an image-typed attribute, exercising both the componentTypes-driven dispatch path (image type registered on commerce_assets.heroBanner) and the per-locale page metadata overlay. Synthetic capture — both inputs and outputs were authored by hand. Expected output is what resolvePage should emit at locale fr_FR after applying the overlay and stamping the image URL.
